description: Schema for LXX divergence diffs applicable to the Masoretic Old Hebrew text

replace.description: Replace one or more words at target indices with new words

insert.description: Insert new words after a given word index. Use after_word: -1 to insert at start of verse.

diff_entry.target_words: Array of 0-based word indices to replace or remove
diff_entry.after_word: 0-based word index to insert after (-1 for start of verse)
diff_entry.new_words: Array of { hebrew, transliteration, definition } objects. hebrew is square script (with or without nikkud). Old Hebrew (Phoenician) is derived automatically at application time.
diff_entry.lxx_greek: The LXX Greek text for this divergence
diff_entry.lxx_english: English translation of the LXX reading
